entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: UAV IMAGERY
entities.description: Unmanned aerial vehicle images used to assess spatial variability of yield and fertilizer response

entities.name: VEGETATION INDEX
entities.description: Indices calculated from imagery to assess crop health and growth

entities.name: GENERAL LINEAR MODELS
entities.description: Statistical models used to assess the predictability of yield and fertilizer response

entities.name: LEAVE-FIELD-OUT PROCEDURE
entities.description: A validation method used to test the generalizability of the models

entities.name: CROP GROWTH MODELS
entities.description: Models used to account for spatial variability and improve yield assessments

entities.name: FERTILIZER APPLICATION
entities.description: The process of applying fertilizer to crops to improve growth

entities.name: SHALLOW SOILS
entities.description: Soil type that may limit root growth and nutrient availability

entities.name: POOR GROWING CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental factors that negatively impact crop growth

entities.name: CROP STRESS
entities.description: Physiological stress experienced by crops due to environmental or management factors

entities.name: MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Agricultural practices applied to the crops

entities.name: HETEROGENEOUS SMALLHOLDER CONDITIONS
entities.description: Diverse and variable conditions found on small-scale farms

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.description: The variation of a property across a geographic area
